violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The facility is lacking an allergy statement on the menu. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by various objects. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
